overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked, neon-lit futuristic city at night. The journey progresses from covered walkways through open streets and plazas to an elevated pedestrian bridge overlooking traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered neon arcade transitioning to palm-lined walkway

events.description: exiting the intensely red-lit covered area into a more diffused, misty open space

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a futuristic arcade with red neon lighting, passing by a glass office building

notable_agents.action: woman in a yellow dress standing near a circular kiosk, looking at her phone

entered.detail: building front with intense red neon strip lighting and glass panels
tall modern building with reflective glass facade showing neon reflections
overhead concrete structure providing shelter from rain
tall palm tree visible in the distance through the mist
rounded structure with yellow trim and blue base, possibly a vendor stall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered walkway bathed in intense red neon light from a building facade on the left. The character walks forward on wet, reflective tiles, passing a woman in yellow near a circular kiosk. As the character progresses, the covered roof gives way to a more open area with palm trees visible through the rainy haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian street with palm trees and commercial signage

agents.ego_description: proceeding down a wide pedestrian street lined with palm trees and futuristic buildings, navigating through moderate crowds

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in a blue hoodie walking in the same direction

entered.detail: dark building with multiple colorful neon signs and advertisements
tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising into the fog
ground floor commercial spaces with glowing entrances

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open pedestrian street flanked by palm trees and towering glass buildings. The rain continues to fall, creating reflections on the wet pavement. Various pedestrians walk in the same direction, and neon signs illuminate the right side of the street while the red neon facade disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with large digital billboards and underpass

events.description: turning right into a narrower street lined with large advertisements
entering a covered underpass area with the 'NETTERHORN SWEETS' neon sign visible

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrower street with large digital billboards, passing under an overpass structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding a blue umbrella walking ahead

entered.detail: massive screen displaying an advertisement with a person's face
tall structure with vertical yellow neon strip lighting
large advertisement with purple and white text reading 'MIX IT UP'
bright cyan neon sign for a sweets shop under an overhang
heavy concrete beams and pillars forming a covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrower street dominated by large digital billboards on the left, including one for 'AVANTE' and another reading 'MIX IT UP.' The environment becomes more enclosed as the character enters an underpass area with a prominent cyan 'NETTERHORN SWEETS' neon sign on the right. The space feels more confined with concrete structures overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with trees and food stalls transitioning to elevated walkway

events.description: exiting the underpass into an open plaza with trees and benches
ascending a ramp to reach an elevated pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza with scattered pedestrians, then ascending a ramp to an elevated walkway

entered.detail: mature trees planted in large rectangular blue planters
long yellow-topped benches for public seating
small vendor stalls with neon lighting
accumulated garbage bags near the plaza edge
red neon sign on a distant building
sloped concrete pathway leading upward

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass into a spacious open plaza featuring trees in large planters, concrete benches, and food stalls. The area has a more relaxed atmosphere with scattered pedestrians. The character then ascends a ramp, transitioning from ground level to an elevated pedestrian walkway, with the 'KASEN' sign visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking busy street with color-changing neon lighting

events.description: overhead neon light tubes shift from cyan to intense red/pink color
view opens up to show busy street with moving traffic below

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated walkway while observing the traffic and cityscape below, passing under color-changing neon lights

entered.detail: concrete and metal safety barrier along the walkway edge
long linear neon fixtures running the length of the walkway ceiling, changing colors
multi-lane road with cars and buses moving below the walkway
distant bridge structure connecting buildings across the street
large screens mounted on distant skyscrapers displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on an elevated pedestrian walkway with a concrete railing overlooking a busy street. The character walks under long overhead neon tubes that shift from cyan to vibrant red. Below, moderate traffic flows along the wet streets, and distant digital billboards illuminate the foggy night. The walkway provides an elevated perspective of the cyberpunk cityscape before the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked futuristic city, transitioning from enclosed neon walkways to an elevated perspective of the urban sprawl. It begins in a covered walkway bathed in intense red light, moving past a circular kiosk and a woman in yellow before the roof opens up to a pedestrian street lined with palm trees and towering glass buildings. As the character progresses, the scene shifts into a narrower street dominated by large digital billboards and a confined underpass marked by a cyan neon sign. The environment then expands into a spacious open plaza with food stalls and planters before the camera ascends a ramp toward an elevated pedestrian walkway. Finally, the view opens up over a concrete railing, following the character under shifting cyan and red overhead lights as they overlook the flowing traffic and foggy cityscape below.
